reasoning: The question asks whether Discord will officially announce an IPO or file an SEC Form S-1 before July 1, 2025. News reports from January 2026 indicate that Discord "confidentially filed" for an IPO at that time. If Discord had publicly filed an S-1 or made a specific announcement on their official news blog prior to July 2025, a confidential filing in early 2026 would be contradictory and unnecessary. These January 2026 reports also summarize the IPO timeline leading up to the confidential filing, referencing the March 2025 rumors but citing no official public announcements or filings in the interim. Consequently, no qualifying announcement or public S-1 filing occurred before the July 1, 2025 deadline.
